habitat: Deciduous moist forest with undergrowth; parks; gardens; and wooded habitats
story: In the diverse world of birds, the European Robin (Erithacus rubecula) stands out. This species, part of the Muscicapidae family, is a resident of Deciduous moist forest with undergrowth; parks; gardens; and wooded habitats. Its IUCN Red List status is Least Concern (LC), which serves as a call to action for habitat preservation. The European Robin is more than just a bird; it is a symbol of the rich biodiversity that we must protect. Through this poster, we hope to foster a greater understanding and appreciation for the European Robin and its role in the ecosystem.
Every poster is crafted to inspire curiosity about our planet's incredible biodiversity.
